scripts.app:driver: cross-env APP_VARIANT=driver yarn workspace mobile-app start
scripts.app:rider: cross-env APP_VARIANT=rider yarn workspace mobile-app start
scripts.app:rider-tunnel: cross-env APP_VARIANT=rider yarn workspace mobile-app start --tunnel
scripts.app:driver-tunnel: cross-env APP_VARIANT=driver yarn workspace mobile-app start --tunnel
scripts.app:build-ios: cd mobile-app && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.app:build-android: cd mobile-app && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.app:build-android-apk: cd mobile-app && eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.app:build-ios-sim: cd mobile-app && eas build -p ios --profile simulator
scripts.app:build-dev-android-apk: cd mobile-app && eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.build:driver:android: cd mobile-app && cross-env APP_VARIANT=driver eas build --platform android --profile preview:driver
scripts.build:driver:ios: cd mobile-app && cross-env APP_VARIANT=driver eas build --platform ios --profile production:driver
scripts.build:rider:android: cd mobile-app && cross-env APP_VARIANT=rider eas build --platform android --profile preview:rider
scripts.build:rider:ios: cd mobile-app && cross-env APP_VARIANT=rider eas build --platform ios --profile production:rider
scripts.web:deploy: yarn workspace web-app build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy: yarn workspace web-app build && firebase deploy && node script/install.js initialize
scripts.postinstall: patch-package && node script/install.js install && node scripts/eas-android-prebuild.cjs
